# 2026-03-07 News - Montague Tech

## Cross-Company Collaboration Controversy
**Source:** internal | **Time:** 11:00
Tensions escalated after Tybalt Capulet discovered unauthorized collaboration between Montague Tech and Capulet Industries employees. Mercutio Escalus's consulting contract was terminated.

## Legal Teams Reviewing IP Implications
**Source:** internal | **Time:** 16:00
Both companies' legal teams are reviewing potential IP concerns related to the undisclosed cross-company project.
